sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْجَدَّةُ تَجْلِسُ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ بِجَانِبِ سَرِيرِ حَفِيدِهَا الصَّغِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Baka bi svake večeri sjedila pored kreveta svog malog unuka.
sentences.translationEn: Every night, grandmother would sit beside her little grandson's bed.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَحْكِي لَهُ قِصَصًا عَنِ الْجِنِّ وَالْمُلُوكِ وَالْأَرَاضِي الْبَعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pričala mu je priče o džinovima, kraljevima i dalekim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: She would tell him stories about genies, kings, and faraway lands.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطِّفْلُ يَسْتَمِعُ بِعَيْنَيْنِ وَاسِعَتَيْنِ وَقَلْبٍ مَفْتُوحٍ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je slušalo sa širom otvorenim očima i otvorenim srcem.
sentences.translationEn: The child would listen with wide eyes and an open heart.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنْ يُرِيدُ أَنْ تَنْتَهِيَ الْقِصَّةُ.
sentences.translationEn: He never wanted the story to end.

sentences.arabic: نَامَ فِي النِّهَايَةِ وَهُوَ يَبْتَسِمُ، وَأَحْلَامُهُ مَلِيئَةٌ بِالْمَغَامَرَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju bi zaspalo s osmijehom, a snovi bi mu bili puni avantura.
sentences.translationEn: He would finally fall asleep smiling, his dreams full of adventures.
